object_type: trusted external solver binding contract for CLASS-compatible, CAMB-compatible, or custom DFM-MKC solver execution
purpose: Specify the external solver binding requirements needed before any numerical prediction-vector or likelihood run, while explicitly not executing or validating an external solver.

binding_contract.input_schema: Required schema for cosmological, DFM-MKC, grid, nuisance, and solver parameters.
binding_contract.output_schema: Required schema for background, transfer, observable, and diagnostic outputs.
binding_contract.unit_convention: Required unit conventions for all inputs and outputs.
binding_contract.covariance_alignment: Required covariance, mask, and observable-order alignment.
binding_contract.reproducibility_hashes: Required hashes for inputs, outputs, environment, and solver commit.

adapter_requirements.dfm_mkc_background_adapter: Maps DFM-MKC background equations into the external solver background interface.
adapter_requirements.dfm_mkc_perturbation_adapter: Maps DFM-MKC perturbation variables into the external solver perturbation interface.
adapter_requirements.observable_adapter: Maps external solver outputs into ACT, Planck, DESI, matter-power, and weak-lensing slots.
adapter_requirements.diagnostic_adapter: Maps external solver diagnostics into repository validation fields.
adapter_requirements.adapter_status: Adapter requirements are declared only; no adapter is executed here.

trust_gates.schema_gate: Input and output schemas must match DFM-MKC prediction-vector ordering before use.
trust_gates.hash_gate: Solver source, environment, inputs, and outputs must be hash-locked before use.
trust_gates.diagnostic_gate: Constraint residuals, finite-output checks, and convergence summaries must pass before prediction-vector promotion.
trust_gates.reproducibility_gate: A clean rerun must reproduce output hashes or explain deterministic tolerances before use.
trust_gates.empirical_claim_gate: No empirical claim is reachable from this binding contract alone.

next_admissible_step: Supply DFM_MKC_EXTERNAL_SOLVER_ADAPTER_IMPLEMENTATION_V1 or DFM_MKC_PRODUCTION_SOLVER_CODE_V1 before any numerical prediction-vector run.
